narrative:
Precinct Brinkhaven (precinct in Knox County) has 71 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Republican lean of 5.6 percentage points.
